raw_consumer_statement:
To Whom It May Concern, I am formally requesting immediate assistance regarding a fraudulent online purchase of {$78.00} and the mishandling of my dispute claim.

I purchased two shampoos from a website that appeared to represent XXXX XXXX. After placing the order, I discovered that the seller was not affiliated with the legitimate company and was operating fraudulently. The individual identifying himself as XXXX sent me incorrect items that did not match my order. 

When I contacted the seller regarding the incorrect items, I requested a prepaid return shipping label because the seller shipped the wrong merchandise. Instead, I was repeatedly told that I needed to pay for return shipping myself before receiving a refund. 

I then opened a dispute with my credit card company, Citibank, because the seller failed to properly resolve the issue. Despite explaining that I received incorrect items and that the merchant appeared fraudulent, the dispute was repeatedly reopened and inadequately investigated. 

Citibank ultimately informed me that I needed to return the items in order to receive my refund. Following those instructions, I paid approximately {$12.00} out of pocket to return the merchandise on XX/XX/year>. 

After the seller received the returned package, XXXX repeatedly assured me that my refund would be processed within 10 business days. However, it has now been over a month, and I still have not received my refund. 

I have independently investigated this seller and discovered evidence indicating that this is a scam operation impersonating the legitimate XXXX XXXX company. I have already submitted supporting evidence, including emails, tracking information, proof of return shipment, screenshots, and communications with the seller, to Citibanks disputes department. 

Despite providing substantial documentation, my credit card company has failed to properly protect me from this fraudulent transaction or assist me in recovering my money. 

I am requesting the following : 1. Immediate reimbursement for the fraudulent transaction. 
XXXX. Reimbursement for the {$12.00} return shipping expense I was forced to pay. 
XXXX. A thorough reinvestigation of this dispute. 
XXXX. An investigation into the fraudulent seller impersonating XXXX XXXX. 
XXXX. Confirmation that appropriate action will be taken to prevent additional consumers from being scammed. 

I have maintained all records and evidence related to this matter and am prepared to provide additional documentation upon request. 

Thank you for your prompt attention to this serious issue. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for my dispute with Citibank
